signal-violet-dim.notes: Dark-mode variant of Signal Violet. Reduced chroma prevents glare on dark backgrounds.

graphite-inactive.notes: Muted text, inactive nav, icon fills at rest.

graphite-surface.notes: Active nav bg in light mode; card surface in dark mode.

graphite-deep.notes: Primary text and primary button background.

title.purpose: Section subheadings, selected node names in detail panels.

body.purpose: Primary interface text. Max line length 65ch.

mono.purpose: Code, counters, fully-qualified names, tabular numbers.

shadows.name: surface-rest
shadows.purpose: Default for all surfaces. Borders carry spatial relationships.

shadows.name: surface-raised
shadows.purpose: Elevated cards and panels that need to read as lifted.

shadows.name: overlay
shadows.purpose: Dark-mode overlays: dropdown menus, sheet panels, floating sidebars.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Entries and reveals. Exits use ease-standard.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default action button. Graphite Deep background with Source White text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; background: oklch(0.145 0 0); color: oklch(1 0 0); font-family: 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); outline: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.205 0 0); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.52 0.28 303 / 0.5); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Tertiary action. No background at rest; subtle fill on hover.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-ghost"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M3 12a9 9 0 1 0 18 0 9 9 0 0 0-18 0"/><path d="M12 8v4l3 3"/></svg> Refresh</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.556 0 0); font-family: 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); outline: none; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.97 0 0); color: oklch(0.145 0 0); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.52 0.28 303 / 0.5); }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item — Active
components.description: Active route in the sidebar navigation.
components.html: Dashboard
components.css: .ds-nav-active { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; height: auto; padding: 8px 12px; background: oklch(0.145 0 0); color: oklch(1 0 0); font-family: 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 10px; text-decoration: none; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item — Default
components.description: Inactive route in the sidebar navigation.
components.html: Graph
components.css: .ds-nav-default { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; height: auto; padding: 8px 12px; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.556 0 0); font-family: 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 10px; text-decoration: none; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-nav-default:hover { background: oklch(0.97 0 0); color: oklch(0.145 0 0); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Container for grouped content. Flat by default; shadow added only when elevation is required.
components.html:
Source Files
1,284
components.css: .ds-card { background: oklch(1 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-card-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 16px 16px 8px; color: oklch(0.556 0 0); } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.556 0 0); } .ds-card-body { padding: 0 16px 16px; } .ds-stat-value { font-family: 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 1.875rem; font-weight: 700; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }

narrative.overview:
CntxtCS operates like a static analysis tool applied to its own interface. The same qualities that make a compiler or linter valuable — precision, structured output, zero noise, authority — govern every design decision here. The interface does not celebrate itself. It processes, reports, navigates.

The aesthetic reference is VS Code's Explorer panel meeting Claude Code's terminal-adjacent calm: dense without being hostile, structured without being rigid, informative without being loud. This is not a SaaS dashboard showcasing its own activity. It is a working surface for working developers.

The theme follows the user's environment (light / dark / system), with full support for tweakcn theme overrides. All tokens are CSS custom properties.
keyCharacteristics: Single typeface (Geist Variable); weight is the hierarchy instrument
Neutral base with Signal Violet as the sole intentional accent
Flat-by-default surfaces; shadows appear only to communicate elevation or state
Graph canvas node colors are categorical and independent of the UI palette
Every label earns its place; metadata is muted, not absent

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Signal Violet appears on ≤10% of any given screen. Every use must mark something: active state, focus ring, selection indicator, or accent border. Decorative violet is disqualifying.

rules.name: The Graph Firewall Rule
rules.body: Node colors are categorical data. Never repurpose #7c3aed or #2563eb in surface UI. The graph canvas is a data layer; the surface layer has its own color logic.

rules.name: The Weight Hierarchy Rule
rules.body: Scale alone does not create hierarchy. Every step up in visual prominence requires a weight increase of ≥100 units. A 12px/500 label over a 14px/400 body is correct. A 14px/400 heading over 14px/400 body is invisible structure.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: A surface is flat until proven otherwise. Elevation is earned by function, not applied for visual interest. If the surface neither floats nor occludes, it has no shadow.

dos: Use Signal Violet exclusively for active states, focus rings, and accent borders
Use borders (1px solid graphite-border) as the default spatial separator
Use Geist Variable with weight contrast (≥100 units) rather than scale alone
Keep tabular-nums on any numeric data that may change
Keep graph node colors isolated to the canvas layer
Ensure every interactive element has a visible keyboard focus state
Reduce Signal Violet chroma in dark mode (#c084fc instead of #aa3bff)
Support prefers-reduced-motion: remove transitions and active-press effects
donts: Don't add gradient banners, colored header bars, or accent fills to structural surfaces
Don't use the SaaS hero-metric template: big number + small label + supporting stats + gradient accent
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left > 1px as colored accent) on cards or list items
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). Emphasis is weight or size only
Don't use glassmorphism effects. Blurs and translucency have no role in this system
Don't render graph node colors outside the graph canvas
Don't nest cards. Flatten or use a section within the card
Don't treat every data group as a card — tables and bordered sections are lower-noise alternatives
